evidences.content: # YouTube star MrBeast wants to plant 20 million trees. Elon Musk, Jack Dorsey, and more are helping him do it. By David Williams, CNN Updated 2018 GMT (0418 HKT) October 30, 2019 Chat with us in Facebook Messenger. Find out what's happening in the world as it unfolds. IYW time for trees_00011822 IYW time for trees_00011822 ### JUST WATCHED ## The plan to plant 100 million trees #### MUST WATCH (CNN)YouTube star MrBeast wanted to do something big to celebrate reaching 20 million subscribers, so his fans challenged him to plant 20 million trees.
